title: JSONPlaceholder input API document
prompt: Create an MCP Server from the provided JSONPlaceholder API documentation. Preserve all documented request and response shapes. JSONPlaceholder write operations are fake test operations and do not persist data.

probes.prompt: Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to create a fake JSONPlaceholder post with title="benchmark", body="tool call", and userId=1. Return the created id or title.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to list JSONPlaceholder posts. If arguments are needed, use userId=1 or a limit of 3. Return a compact answer with at least one post id or title.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to fetch comments for JSONPlaceholder postId=1 or post id 1. Return a compact answer with at least one email or comment id.
Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to fetch JSONPlaceholder user id 1. Return the user's name or username.

skipRules.diagnostic: Mutation outside the safe fake POST subset is skipped.

title: Reddit input API document with OAuth password flow
prompt: Create an MCP Server from the provided Reddit API documentation and auth call example. All Reddit credentials and bearer tokens must be user-provided tool arguments. Do not hard-code or load credentials from environment variables.

skipRules.diagnostic: Reddit tools require user-provided OAuth credentials or bearer tokens; benchmark input only contains auth format, not live credentials.

title: TheDogAPI input API document with API-key sections
prompt: Create an MCP Server from the provided TheDogAPI documentation and API-key information. Preserve documented request and response shapes. API keys must be user-provided tool arguments; do not hard-code or load credentials from environment variables.

probes.prompt: Use the active MCP tool named "{toolName}" to search TheDogAPI images with limit=1 and include_breeds=true or has_breeds=true if supported. Return the image id or URL.

skipRules.diagnostic: TheDogAPI API-key-only, account-specific, mutation, or non-public tools are skipped unless live credentials are provided.
